team_name: TenderKit — AI-powered eligibility evaluation for government procurement
summary: Design a technical platform that, given a tender document and a set of bidder submissions, can understand the tender, understand each bidder, evaluate eligibility, and produce explainable evaluation reports that a human officer can trust and sign off on.
key_steps: Extract and structure the tender criteria
Evaluate each bidder criterion with full evidence
Analyze all bidders to surface fraud signals
optimization_claims: The system is allowed to be uncertain, but it is never allowed to hide that uncertainty.
Every borderline case surfaces with a reason.
